debug_info.goal:
r : ℝ
⊢ Tendsto (fun x => Real.sinh (r * x) / x) (nhdsWithin 0 {0}ᶜ) (nhds r)

    have h' := (Real.hasDerivAt_sinh 0).comp ((hasDerivAt_id 0).const_mul r)
    rwa [Real.cosh_zero, one_mul] at h'
  simpa [Real.sinh_zero] using h.hasDerivAt_iff_tendsto.1
